subject: Re: Processing pre-motion corrected tilt-images results in failure at fs_motion_and_ctf step
body:
Hey Tom,
You probably don’t want to do motion_abd_CT’s but just CTF!
You can check 
> WarpWorker 
for details for the available commands.
Best,
Philipp.
PS. I always have to make an „average“ folder in my warp_frameseries folder in which I then link / copy the motion corrected frames.
Sent from my iPhone
On 7 Nov 2024, at 20:38, thomas.la...@gmail.com <thomas.laughliniii@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hello fellow warpers!
I have just started using WarpTools (warp-2.0.0dev29) and had success with the example apoferritin dataset.
I am now running into an issue where I have a dataset that was in the form of pre-motion corrected tilt-series. I busted up the tilt-series into tilt-images and modified the .mdoc to reference them in the SubFramePath.
To initialize the settings I run:
"WarpTools create_settings --output warp_frameseries.settings --folder_data frames --folder_processing warp_frameseries --extension "*.tif" --angpix 2.679 --exposure 0"
Then:
"WarpTools fs_motion_and_ctf --settings warp_frameseries.settings --m_grid 1x1x1 --c_grid 2x2x1 --c_range_min 30 --c_range_max 10 --c_defocus_min 4 --c_defocus_max 6 --out_averages"
All the items list as failed to process in the stdout and the log file contents look like:
'Received "LoadStack", with 4 arguments, for GPU #0, 22023 MB free:
Loaded stack: 5760, 4092, 1, normal, real, 1 A/px, ID = -1, disposed, 1
Execution took 0.135 seconds
Received "MovieProcessMovement", with 2 arguments, for GPU #0, 22023 MB free:
System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object.
at Warp.Tools.MathHelper.Diff(float2[] data) in /efshome/tlaughlin/packages/warp2/2.0.0dev29/WarpLib/Tools/MathHelper.cs:line 735
t Warp.Movie.ProcessShift(Image originalStack, ProcessingOptionsMovieMovement options) in /efshome/tlaughlin/packages/warp2/2.0.0dev29/WarpLib/Movie.cs:line 2455
at WarpWorker.WarpWorker.EvaluateCommand(NamedSerializableObject Command) in /efshome/tlaughlin/packages/warp2/2.0.0dev29/WarpWorker/WarpWorker.cs:line 277'
Any idea as to what setting/flag I am setting improperly?
Thanks for the help!
-Tom




--
